nasb.text: Its abundant produce is for the kings Whom You have set over us because of our sins; They also rule over our bodies And over our cattle as they please, So we are in great distress.

esv.text: And its rich yield goes to the kings whom you have set over us because of our sins. They rule over our bodies and over our livestock as they please, and we are in great distress.

cnv.text: 這地豐富的出產都歸給列王， 就是你因我們的罪派來管轄我們的； 他們也隨意管轄我們的身體 和我們的牲畜； 我們遭遇大患難。

ccb.text: 因为我们的罪过，这地方的丰富出产都归给了那些你派来统管我们的王。他们随意统管我们和我们的牲畜。我们生活在极大的苦难中。
